title: LLM Vocabulary Response
description: Response containing the model's vocabulary tokens
documentation:
## Purpose
Returns the full token vocabulary of a loaded LLM, enabling token-level analysis, prompt engineering tools, and custom tokenization utilities to operate without a separate tokenizer library.

## When to use
This is the response to a `get_vocab` request in a [LLM Generation Request](https://capdag.com/browse/media:llm-generation-request;json;record). Use it when you need to enumerate, inspect, or count the tokens the model recognises.

## Notes
The `vocab` array is ordered by token ID. The `vocab_size` field should equal the length of `vocab`; include it as a convenience for consumers that only need the count without iterating the full array. Vocabulary extraction is typically slow on large models; cache the result when possible.
